final:
module top_module(
    operand1,
    b,
    opcode,
    result
);input signed [7:0] operand1, b;
input [1:0] opcode;
output reg signed [7:0] result;

always @(*) begin
    case (opcode)
        2'b00: result = operand1 + b; // addition
        2'b01: result = operand1 - b; // subtraction
        2'b10: result = operand1 * b; // multiplication
        2'b11: result = operand1 / b; // division
    endcase
end

endmodule
